aboutPage.title: About AutoRepara
aboutPage.subtitle: Connecting you with Trusted Workshops
aboutPage.intro: We are the leading platform connecting vehicle owners with certified and trusted auto repair shops from coast to coast.
aboutPage.missionDesc: To simplify the search for quality automotive services, connecting drivers with certified workshops that provide honest, transparent, and professional service.
aboutPage.visionDesc: To be the number one reference platform for automotive services, recognized for our network of certified workshops and commitment to satisfaction.
aboutPage.discoverDesc: See how we're transforming the way you find trusted automotive services
aboutPage.storyDesc: How AutoRepara started and where we're heading
aboutPage.storyIntro: AutoRepara was born in 2018 from a real need: finding trustworthy auto repair shops shouldn't be a gamble.
aboutPage.readyTitle: Ready to Find Your Ideal Workshop?

contactPage.title: Contact Us
contactPage.subtitle: We're here to help. Get in touch through any of our channels.
contactPage.subject: Subject
contactPage.receivedMessage: We've received your message and will get back to you soon.
contactPage.getInTouchSoon: We'll get back to you soon.
contactPage.faqQ1: How do I list my workshop on AutoRepair?
contactPage.faqA1: Simply contact us through this form or send an email to list@autorepara.net. We'll guide you through the verification process.
contactPage.faqQ2: Is there a fee to list my business?
contactPage.faqA2: Basic listings are free. We also offer premium listing options with additional features and visibility.
contactPage.faqA3: We verify business licenses, insurance, and collect customer reviews to ensure quality service.
contactPage.faqQ4: Can I update my workshop information?
contactPage.faqA4: Yes! Once listed, you'll have access to a dashboard where you can update your information anytime.
